message.content:
@startuml
title band301

participant BTManager
participant BTCallback
participant BleController
participant ScannerPresenter
participant LeScannerV21
participant WristbandManager
participant L2Layer
participant L2KeyPacket
participant L2CMDPacket
participant L1Layer
participant L1Packet
participant GattLayer
participant BluetoothGatt

activate BTManager
BTManager -> BTManager : onCreate
BTManager -> WristbandManager : initial
activate WristbandManager
WristbandManager -> L2Layer : new
activate L2Layer
L2Layer -> L1Layer : new
activate L1Layer
L1Layer -> L1Packet : new
activate L1Packet
L1Layer -> GattLayer : new
activate GattLayer

BTManager -> BleController : initial
activate BleController
BleController -> ScannerPresenter : new
activate ScannerPresenter
ScannerPresenter -> LeScannerV21 : new
activate LeScannerV21

== 搜索设备 ==

BTManager -> BTManager : forceIeScan
BTManager -> BTManager : scanLeDevice
note left : 搜索蓝牙设备
BTManager -> BTManager : scanDevice
BTManager -> ScannerPresenter : scanLe
BTManager -> ScannerPresenter : scanLeDevice
ScannerPresenter -> LeScannerV21 : startScan
BTManager -> BTManager : onScanResult
ScannerPresenter -> ScannerPresenter : notifyLeScan
BTManager -> ScannerPresenter : onLeScan
BTManager -> BTManager : onNewDevice
note left : MSC_FIND_BONDED_DEVICE
BTManager -> BTManager : mHandler.handleMessage

== 建立GATT连接 ==

note left of BTManager : Connect：找到目标的地址，使用该地址进行蓝牙连接

BTManager -> WristbandManager : connect
WristbandManager -> GattLayer : connect
GattLayer -> GattLayer : startTxSchedule
note right of GattLayer : 开启两个线程，Tx发送，Rx接收
GattLayer -> GattLayer : startRxSchedule
GattLayer -> BluetoothGatt : connect
BluetoothGatt --> GattLayer : onConnectionStateChange
note right of BluetoothGatt : 设置MTU：240
GattLayer -> BluetoothGatt : requestMtu
BluetoothGatt --> GattLayer : onMtuChanged
GattLayer -> BluetoothGatt : discoverServices
note right of GattLayer : 通过UUID，发现我们设置的Services和数据接收Characteristic
BluetoothGatt --> GattLayer : onServicesDiscovered
BluetoothGatt --> GattLayer : onDescriptorWrite
GattLayer -> GattLayer : mGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange
GattLayer -> L1Layer : mTransportCallback.onConnectionStateChange
note left : MSG_STATE_CONNECTED
L1Layer -> WristbandManager : mApplicationCallback.onConnectionStateChange
WristbandManager -> BTManager : mHandler.handleMessage
BTManager -> BTManager : StartLoginProcess

BTManager -> WristbandManager : RequestLogin
BTManager -> WristbandManager : RequestSetNeedInfo
BTManager -> WristbandManager : SetUserProfile

== 封装并发送数据-Tx ==

BTManager -> WristbandManager : SettingCmdUserSetting
WristbandManager -> L2Layer : preparePacket：key：B1:data.len：< 8：data
note left : 封包L2
L2Layer -> L2Layer : preparePacket：cmd(1B):version(1B)
L2Layer -> L1Layer : sendData
note left : 封包L1
L1Layer -> L1Layer : prepareDataPacket
note right : magic:A8; er~ack~version:00; len(2B):crc(2B):seq(2B)
L1Layer -> L1Packet : preparePacket
L1Layer -> L1Layer : addToTxPacketList
note right of L1Layer : 每隔1秒查询一次是否有新数据，有就发送，重试x次
L1Layer -> L1Layer : ThreadTx.run
L1Layer -> L1Layer : getFromTxPacketList
L1Layer -> L1Layer : UnpackSendPacket
note right of L1Layer : 要发送的数据帧为每 ≤ n 个字节发送一次，直到发送完毕
L1Layer -> GattLayer : sendGattLayerData
GattLayer -> BluetoothGatt : sendData
note right of GattLayer : 反馈发送成功，SequenceId++
BluetoothGatt --> L1Layer : mBleunpackPacketSend
L1Layer -> WristbandManager : onDataSend

== 接收数据-Rx ==

BluetoothGatt --> GattLayer : onCharacteristicChanged
GattLayer -> L1Layer : mGattCallback.onDataReceive
L1Layer -> L1Layer : receiveData
note left : 封包L1
L1Layer -> L1Layer : decodeReceiveData
note right : parseHeader 解析magic，ack，目标位，crc，sequence
L1Layer -> L1Layer : parseData
note left : 如果接收的数据包是整个于 L1 中记录的目标长度相同，LT_FULL_PACKET\n否则，把数据存起来 RSNAK，是DLT_SUCCESS，则将数据推送给上层
L1Layer -> L1Layer : sendAckPacket
note right : 向手环发送应答Pack
L1Layer -> L1Layer : addToRxPacketList
note right of L1Layer : 每隔1秒查询一次是否有新数据，有就传出
L1Layer -> L1Layer : ThreadRx.run
L1Layer -> L1Layer : getFromRxPacketList
L1Layer -> WristbandManager : onDataReceive
note left : 封包L2
WristbandManager -> L2Layer : parseData 封包L2：cmd(1B):version(1B)
WristbandManager -> BTManager : parseData 封包:key：1B：，len：2B：data

== handshake ==

BTManager -> BTManager : handshake
BTManager -> WristbandManager : handshake
WristbandManager -> L2Layer : handshake
L2Layer -> GattLayer : sendData
L2Layer -> WristbandManager : onDataReceive
WristbandManager -> BTManager : onHandshakeCallback
BTManager -> BTManager : onHandshakeCallback

@enduml
